data.name: Aboleth
data.description: Enormous, antediluvian catfish covered in slime and tentacles. They hate all intelligent beings.

features.name: Curse
features.description: DC 15 CON or target gains a magical curse, turning into a deep one over 2d10 days.

features.name: Enslave
features.description: In place of attacks, one creature within far DC 15 WIS or aboleth controls for 1d4 rounds.

features.name: Telepathic
features.description: Read the thoughts of all creatures within far.
